scripts.build: type src\shared.jsx src\Visualization.jsx src\Controls.jsx src\Sheets.jsx src\Nav.jsx src\App.jsx | babel --filename components.jsx --out-file components.js
scripts.watch: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$files = 'src\\shared.jsx','src\\Visualization.jsx','src\\Controls.jsx','src\\Sheets.jsx','src\\Nav.jsx','src\\App.jsx'; $times = @{}; foreach($f in $files){ $times[$f] = (Get-Item $f).LastWriteTimeUtc }; cmd /c npm run build; while($true){ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 400; $changed = $false; foreach($f in $files){ $t = (Get-Item $f).LastWriteTimeUtc; if($t -ne $times[$f]){ $times[$f] = $t; $changed = $true } }; if($changed){ cmd /c npm run build } }"
